creator: c47g@gmx.at
text:
This patch adds a new vendor "Sony Ericsson Mobile Communications AB"
	and one of its products (M600i cell phone) to the usbdevs list.

Fix: 

/* Sony Ericsson products */
 product SONYERICSSON DCU10     0x0528  USB Cable
+product SONYERICSSONMOBILE M600I       0xd031  M600i

 /* SOURCENEXT products */
 product SOURCENEXT KEIKAI8     0x039f  KeikaiDenwa 8--Bytogu9TXqR5gLtaDD8dAQpHmZcCKRRv8S3g5UV55bJelE47
Content-Type: text/plain; name="file.diff"
Content-Transfer-Encoding: 7bit
Content-Disposition: attachment; filename="file.diff"

--- /usr/src/sys/dev/usb/usbdevs        Sun Jul 30 09:21:40 2006
+++ /tmp/usbdevs        Sun Jul 30 09:25:09 2006
@@ -486,6 +486,7 @@
 vendor EGALAX          0x0eef  eGalax
 vendor MICROTUNE       0x0f4d  Microtune
 vendor VTECH           0x0f88  VTech
+vendor SONYERICSSONMOBILE  0x0fce  Sony Ericsson Mobile Communications AB
 vendor QUALCOMM2       0x1004  Qualcomm
 vendor GIGABYTE                0x1044  GIGABYTE
 vendor WESTERN         0x1058  Western Digital
@@ -1545,6 +1546,7 @@
